response.justification: Sixteen years of full-stack development significantly exceed the 6+ year requirement, with direct expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes) and current work on AI agent infrastructure. Minor gaps in specific frameworks (Nest.js, Vitest, PostgreSQL) are negligible given the depth of underlying expertise and demonstrated ability to adopt new tools.
strengths: Exceptional full-stack depth across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with 16+ years experience
Direct primary stack match with TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS CDK, and Kubernetes in recent roles
Current AI agent infrastructure work directly addresses the required skill and demonstrates cutting-edge capability
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite strong Node.js/TypeScript foundation
React experience present but less emphasized than Ember.js; PostgreSQL not listed despite MongoDB, MySQL, SQL background
Authentication and security best practices not explicitly demonstrated, though implied by senior-level responsibilities

key_factors.factor: Experience significantly exceeds 6+ year requirement with Staff-level expertise
Specific framework gaps (Nest.js, Vitest, PostgreSQL) require ramp-up
